---
title: "01_assembly"
output: html_document
date: "2026-07-08"
---

Step 1: Document your work

Step 2: Assembly

Step 3: Binning with metabat

Step 4: Check bin quality with checkm

The longest contig: 4706700 contig_131
Functional Analysis of the BBD Metagenome
   Metagenomic assembly corresponds to a species or strain forming part of the Black Band Disease(BBD). The genomes being analyzed are used to make deductions during the metabolic processes occuring within BBD. 
Who is there, or what taxonomic groups of microbes are present?

What can they do? (what genes do they have and what biochemical pathways do these support)

 These are the bin assemblies with more than 15% completeness--> bbd_topbins.txt 
metabat.5
metabat.26
metabat.4
metabat.3
metabat.35
metabat.38
metabat.47
metabat.29
metabat.40
metabat.28
metabat.16
metabat.51
metabat.62
metabat.10

Step 6: Perform taxonomic classification with gtdbtk
